projects.title: Memory Card Matching Game
projects.tagline: A browser-based memory game built with pure JavaScript.
projects.description: A card-matching memory game developed using HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript. The game dynamically generates and shuffles cards, tracks flipped states, detects matching pairs, and prevents invalid moves. Includes win detection logic, move counter, timer functionality, and restart mechanics. Built without frameworks to strengthen understanding of DOM manipulation, event handling, game logic, and state management.

projects.title: Cloud Expense Tracker
projects.tagline: A serverless budget tracking application deployed on AWS.
projects.description: A full-stack expense tracking application hosted on AWS. The frontend is deployed on Amazon S3 and distributed via CloudFront. User authentication is handled through Amazon Cognito. Backend logic is implemented with AWS Lambda and exposed via API Gateway. The system allows secure user registration, login, and expense management with cloud-based data persistence.

projects.title: Content Management System
projects.tagline: A CMS built with ASP.NET Core and MVC architecture.
projects.description: A content management system developed using ASP.NET Core MVC. Implements CRUD operations for managing posts and users, uses Entity Framework for database interaction, and follows the MVC design pattern. Includes authentication, role-based access control, and structured service/repository architecture.

projects.title: Weather Forecast App
projects.tagline: A responsive weather application built with React.
projects.description: A weather forecast application built using React. Fetches real-time weather data from a public weather API and displays current conditions, temperature, and forecast information. Implements React hooks for state management, API data fetching, and conditional rendering with responsive UI design.

projects.title: Spice E-Commerce Store
projects.tagline: A WooCommerce store with custom spice-level filtering.
projects.description: An e-commerce website built with WordPress and WooCommerce for selling cooking spices. Implemented custom filtering by spice level (Mild, Moderate, Spicy/Hot), structured product categories, and optimized the user experience for browsing and product selection. Focused on performance, clean UI, and scalable product architecture.

images.alt: Product listing page with spice filters

projects.title: React Movie Explorer
projects.tagline: A movie search application built with React and API integration.
projects.description: A dynamic movie browsing application built with React. Integrates with a public movie API to fetch and display movie details, posters, ratings, and search results. Uses React hooks for state management, component-based architecture, conditional rendering, and responsive design principles.
